detectors.description:
Ownable.transferOwner(address) (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#27-35) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- this.balance == 0 (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#29)

TimeCapsuleEvent.kill() (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#107-113) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- this.balance == 0 (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#109)
TimeCapsuleEvent.withdraw(uint256) (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#87-103) ignores return value by msg.sender.send(amount) (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#95)

Ownable.transferOwner(address) (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#27-35) should emit an event for: 
	- Owner = _owner (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#31)

Ownable.transferOwner(address)._owner (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#27) lacks a zero-check on :
		- Owner = _owner (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#31)
Modifier Ownable.onlyOwner() (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#15-23) does not always execute _; or revert
detectors.markdown: Modifier [Ownable.onlyOwner()](TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#L15-L23) does not always execute _; or revert

detectors.description:
TimeCapsuleEvent.withdraw(uint256) (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#87-103) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- now >= openDate (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#89)
detectors.markdown:
[TimeCapsuleEvent.withdraw(uint256)](TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#L87-L103) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- [now >= openDate](TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#L89)

detectors.description:
